title: OPEC+ to Boost Oil Production by 548,000 Barrels Per Day in August
content: OPEC+ will increase oil output by 548,000 barrels per day in August, reversing nearly 80% of prior voluntary cuts, though actual gains may fall short due to capacity limits in Iraq and Kazakhstan. Saudi Arabia raised its August crude price to a four-month high, while markets remain jittery over looming U.S. tariff decisions and escalating Red Sea attacks by Yemenâ€™s Houthis.
author: Analysts Account
